item.title: Hello World! 👋
item.description: Hello World! Wheel of Heaven has been launched offically! Wheel of Heaven is a knowledge base around the working theory that life on Earth was intelligently designed by an extraterrestrial civilization, the so-called Elohim. While the working theory is not necessarily something new and there are a certain number of forethinkers within the realm of ancient astronauts, creationism and/or an neo-euhemeristic reading of ancient mythology, the foundation upon which the premises are residing is an unapologetic re-interpretation Raëlism, a new religious movement that goes back to a Frenchman that avowedly met the representative of an extraterrestrial civilization, Yahweh, that left us with an important message of very deep philsophical implications if proven true.
